title: Laaszunsahlo
description: Gives a strong visual feedback to the player when their tools are nearly broken
body:
This resource pack is meant to alert the player when their tools are nearly broken with a visual effect. The tools' color start oscillate with orange when damage reaches 90% of the durability and become complitly red when the damage reaches 99%.
This resource pack is meant to avoid unintentional tool breaking and is not meant to enhance tools texture.
